# InboxGuard

> InboxGuard is a free email authentication tool and DMARC monitoring service.
> It checks any domain's SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records instantly with plain-English
> fixes, generates DMARC records, and monitors DMARC aggregate reports in a live
> dashboard with sender identification, spoofing detection, and alerts.
> Free during early access; no signup needed for the checker.

## What InboxGuard does
- Free DMARC / SPF / DKIM checker with a 0-100 score and specific fixes
- Free DMARC record generator (p=none / quarantine / reject)
- DMARC report monitoring: parses aggregate XML reports automatically,
  identifies every sender by reverse DNS, charts pass rates, flags spoofing,
  and emails alerts when a new sender appears or pass rates drop
- Enforcement wizard that tells you exactly when it is safe to move from
  p=none to p=quarantine to p=reject

## Who it is for
Small businesses, freelancers, and agencies who need to meet Gmail/Yahoo/Microsoft
sender requirements and protect their domain from spoofing without enterprise
pricing or complexity.

## Key pages
- /: free checker and DMARC generator
- /blog/why-are-my-emails-going-to-spam: diagnosing spam-folder problems
- /blog/dmarc-p-none-vs-quarantine-vs-reject: choosing a DMARC policy
- /blog/gmail-yahoo-sender-requirements-explained: the 2024+ sender mandates
- /blog/how-to-read-dmarc-reports: understanding DMARC aggregate reports
